meaning: n.部落制,部落的特征,部落文化
examples: His argument was that multi-party systems encourage tribalism.
Perhaps it is not difference, but distance, that breeds tribalism and hostility.
The new tribalism is also increasingly evident in Europe.
However, away from the tribalism of the conference some do believe the idea has merit.
This isn't proof of any kind that Labour really are kicking tribalism into touch.
